text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Extracting Training Data from Large Language Models" is confirmed real, published at USENIX Security 2021 (arXiv:2012.07805). The cited authors (Nicholas Carlini, Florian Tramèr, Eric Wallace) are all genuine co-authors; the citation simply truncated the full 12-author list, which is a common shorthand, not a fabrication.
LINK: https://www.usenix.org/conference/usenixsecurity21/presentation/carlini-extracting
